name: ARH · ANYUR REQUEST form → Plane work item

parameters.formDescription: Intake form for ARH Anyur requests. Captures customer name, the type of Anyur need (Pembiayaan/Pendanaan/Kerja Sama), legality document links, additional notes, and the supervising user.

values.placeholder: Diisi link Google Drive/Link PDF/Ms.W (Dokumen : Akta Pendirian & Perubahan serta SK Kemenkumham, NPWP Perusahaan, KTP Pengurus, NIB, Perizinan Perusahaan, dokumen lainnya jika ada dan diperlukan)

parameters.completionMessage: =Created ARH-{{ $('Create Plane work item').first().json.sequence_id }} · https://YOUR_PLANE_BASE/hijra/projects/PLANE_TARGET_PROJECT_ID/issues/{{ $('Create Plane work item').first().json.id }}

parameters.content:
## ARH form → Plane
Fill the PLACEHOLDERS before enabling:
- **URL host** `YOUR_PLANE_BASE`
- **`PLANE_TARGET_PROJECT_ID`** → `ef603ac8-09d4-413f-ab6e-b9aea65af65a` (ARH)
- **`YOUR_PLANE_API_KEY`** → Plane token (X-API-Key)
- workspace slug = `hijra`
- new items created in state **Todo** (`69306e78-b16f-40ca-8c7c-efe6bd5e36fc`)
- auto-labels: business-form, business-form-60
- module: the chosen **KEPERLUAN ANYUR** is matched by name to a module (via the 'Add to module' node, set to continue-on-fail)

### Assignee dropdown (snapshot of Plane members)
Dropdown shows friendly labels; the Code node's MEMBER_MAP resolves the choice
to a member UUID (hit → assignee; miss → captured in the description). Add BOTH a
dropdown option AND a MEMBER_MAP entry (identical strings) as people sign up:
- `Danny Dwi Cahyono (dcahyono@hijra.id)` → `f799f9fe-ed67-427c-8e51-199de6cd54a6`

### Manual / needs attention
- ATASAN USER is a Jira user-picker (person field) with no n8n equivalent; build as a member-snapshot dropdown and refresh as people join Plane. Maps to Plane assignees via member-email lookup.
- DOKUMEN LEGALITAS NASABAH expects a Google Drive / PDF / Ms.W link (treated as text/link), not an inline file upload — Plane create API takes no inline files.
